issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires looking at 5 cards from top of deck, revealing up to 1 {Blackbeard Pirates} type card, adding it to hand, then placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only covers the search portion and uses 'ByName' filter instead of type-based filter. Missing: deck inspection (5 cards), type filtering (not name), and bottom deck placement logic.

Condition incomplete. Effect requires resting 1 DON!! card AND this Character as a cost. Current condition only checks HasRestingDon but does not specify resting this Character is part of the activation cost.
Filter uses 'ByName' with name 'Blackbeard Pirates', but the card text specifies {Blackbeard Pirates} type. Should use type-based filtering, not name-based.
